art_market.summary: Art Basel Hong Kong 2026 is in full swing (Mar 27-29), featuring 240 galleries from 41 countries. The event introduces new sectors like 'Echoes' and 'Zero 10' (digital art).
top_stories: High VIP turnout and strong early sales reported; Picasso work led sales at ~€3.5M.
Citywide 'Hong Kong Art Month' includes M+ Facade projections and Tai Kwun performances.
Exhibitors are emphasizing curated pairings of emerging artists with established masters.

stock_market.summary: Global markets are under pressure due to geopolitical tensions (US-Iran) and concerns over energy prices and inflation. Indices finished lower.
key_factors: Geopolitical uncertainty from US-Iran tensions driving up crude oil prices.
OECD sharply revised G20 inflation forecasts higher to 4% for 2026.
Mixed signals on US-Iran talks keeping markets cautious.
